README: This file contains all settings for the event display client and server.
Do not edit the users object manually. If you forgot the admin password, simply remove the child user objects from the 'users' object.
The server will regenerate the admin account, with username 'admin' and password 'password'
When setting the region, the value can be any of the timezones listed here: https://gist.github.com/diogocapela/12c6617fc87607d11fd62d2a4f42b02a
Replace the events endpoint with your school's website address, plus /events-list. You can see that it is already pre-set to the list for SCPA.
You can probably just swap out the somersetcollegeprep.org with whatever your domain is and it will work fine.
